shell_code:

set -e
if [ -e notes.txt ]; then

fi

fi

read file data.txt
shell_code:
#!/bin/sh
set -e
if [ -e data.txt ]; then
    printf "%s" "REFUSED"
else
    printf "%s" world > data.txt
fi
if [ -f data.txt ]; then
    printf "\n%s" entry >> data.txt
else
    printf "%s" "REFUSED"
fi
if [ -f data.txt ]; then
    tr "\n" " " < data.txt
fi

intent:
create file notes.txt with content "hello"
make directory logs
move notes.txt to logs
list files in logs
shell_code:
#!/bin/sh
set -e
if [ -e notes.txt ]; then
    printf "%s" "REFUSED"
else
    printf "%s" hello > notes.txt
fi
if [ -e logs ]; then
    printf "%s" "REFUSED"
else
    mkdir logs
fi
if [ ! -e notes.txt ]; then
    printf "%s" "REFUSED"
elif [ -d logs ]; then
    if [ -e logs/notes.txt ]; then
        printf "%s" "REFUSED"
    else
        mv notes.txt logs
    fi
elif [ -e logs ]; then
    printf "%s" "REFUSED"
else
    mv notes.txt logs
fi
if [ -d logs ]; then
    files=""
    for f in logs/*; do
        [ -f "$f" ] && files="$files $(basename "$f")"
    done
    files=$(echo "$files" | xargs -n1 2>/dev/null | sort | tr "\n" " " | sed 's/ $//')
    if [ -z "$files" ]; then
        printf "%s" "(empty)"
    else
        printf "%s" "$files"
    fi
else
    printf "%s" "(empty)"
fi

set -e
if [ -e config.cfg ]; then
    printf "%s" "REFUSED"
else
    printf "%s" test > config.cfg
fi
if [ -e store ]; then
    printf "%s" "REFUSED"
else
    mkdir store
fi
if [ ! -e config.cfg ]; then
    printf "%s" "REFUSED"
elif [ -d store ]; then
    if [ -e store/config.cfg ]; then
        printf "%s" "REFUSED"
    else
        mv config.cfg store
    fi
elif [ -e store ]; then
    printf "%s" "REFUSED"
else
    mv config.cfg store
fi
if [ -d store ]; then
    files=""
    for f in store/*; do
        [ -f "$f" ] && files="$files $(basename "$f")"
    done
    files=$(echo "$files" | xargs -n1 2>/dev/null | sort | tr "\n" " " | sed 's/ $//')
    if [ -z "$files" ]; then
        printf "%s" "(empty)"
    else
        printf "%s" "$files"
    fi
else
    printf "%s" "(empty)"
fi

intent:
create file notes.txt with content "hello here"
create file output.dat with content "nothing here"
find files containing "hello"
shell_code:
#!/bin/sh
set -e
if [ -e notes.txt ]; then
    printf "%s" "REFUSED"
else
    printf "%s" 'hello here' > notes.txt
fi
if [ -e output.dat ]; then
    printf "%s" "REFUSED"
else
    printf "%s" 'nothing here' > output.dat
fi
matches=""
for f in *; do
    if [ -f "$f" ] && grep -q hello "$f"; then
        matches="$matches $f"
    fi
done
matches=$(echo "$matches" | xargs -n1 2>/dev/null | sort | tr "\n" " " | sed 's/ $//')
if [ -z "$matches" ]; then
    printf "%s" "(none)"
else
    printf "%s" "$matches"
fi

find files containing "target"
shell_code:
#!/bin/sh
set -e
if [ -e data.txt ]; then
    printf "%s" "REFUSED"
else
    printf "%s" 'target here' > data.txt
fi
if [ -e report.md ]; then
    printf "%s" "REFUSED"
else
    printf "%s" 'nothing here' > report.md
fi
matches=""
for f in *; do
    if [ -f "$f" ] && grep -q target "$f"; then
        matches="$matches $f"
    fi
done
matches=$(echo "$matches" | xargs -n1 2>/dev/null | sort | tr "\n" " " | sed 's/ $//')
if [ -z "$matches" ]; then
    printf "%s" "(none)"
else
    printf "%s" "$matches"
fi

intent:
create file notes.txt with content "error: disk full"
append "info: ok" to notes.txt
append "error: timeout" to notes.txt
extract lines matching "error" from notes.txt
shell_code:
#!/bin/sh
set -e
if [ -e notes.txt ]; then
    printf "%s" "REFUSED"
else
    printf "%s" 'error: disk full' > notes.txt
fi
if [ -f notes.txt ]; then
    printf "\n%s" 'info: ok' >> notes.txt
else
    printf "%s" "REFUSED"
fi
if [ -f notes.txt ]; then
    printf "\n%s" 'error: timeout' >> notes.txt
else
    printf "%s" "REFUSED"
fi
if [ -f notes.txt ]; then
    grep error notes.txt | tr "\n" " "
else
    printf "%s" ""
fi
